case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. JESUS AVILA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, JESUS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL. FAMILY OR OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. UNABLE TO SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON THE DEFT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
